resources.string: Please make sure you are connected to internet,update failed
The lastest version has been downloaded, install now ?
Thank you for your suggestions ! We will review them and provide the necessary improvements in the next updates. Stay tuned!
Enter the competition and awards you have attended

Smart Tennis provides professional sports monitoring and technical analysis for avid tennis players. To fully experience the product, you will need to connect this APP to a smart tennis device, which performs real-time monitoring on parameters like speed, spin balls, your shots and strength. It will then, based on these parameters, evaluate your stamina, skills, exercise strength and playing styles.
Connect failed. Please try again later
Unable to compute due to short exercise time
what about you? Press the QR code to beat me
Connect the sensor to your mobile phone by following these steps:

1. Turn on the sensor and activate the Bluetooth function on your mobile phone.\n2. Login on the “Smart Tennis” APP and click the sensor icon above. \n3. Select your sensor after it is detected by the APP and click Connect.
self-published videos, or your collection of other user\'s wonderful videos will be displayed here.

Intensity is determined by your hitting frequency and energy consumption. It represents the intensity of training or competition. When you having a tough game with a worthy opponent, rally is inevitable, the value of intensity will be higher accordingly.
Confirm to delete sports data for %s?
Confirm to delete today\'s sports data?
The video cannot be recovered once deleted, please back it up to your computer if needed.
Device Name Can not Be Empty
This email address has already been registered
Please enter a valid email address
Attach the sensor to a tennis racket of any brand with the silicon case, or with the 3M tape; both provided.
Your device would generate small amounts of data during transport , it is a normal phenomenon, you can long press the data to clear it.
Thank you for your support for our intelligent tennis products!
An e-mail has been send to:
Please check your inbox for a message from Coollang and follow the instructions in the message.
If you do not receive the e-mail, please check your spam folder or try again later
Only one message can be sent in a minute

‘Fore&Back Hands\' training mode can help you to record your Forehand and backhand training result,you can set the practicing amount and swing speed target before start training and check the statistical report after end training.
The following area will present your stroke data in real time after connecting the device.
Press the \'start training\',the following area will record your Forehand and backhand training amount which achive the standard
(Only the motion which achive the target swing speed will be included the stroke amount)
The Timeline area will feedback your strokes status dynamically in training
means the Forehand and backhand stroke which don\'t achive the target swing speed.

Theoretically, the closer your forehand/backhand using ratio to 50%/50%, the harder your opponent gets to predict your attacking. In a game, a professional player\'s forehand/backhand ratio is generally around 70%/30%. If, in the proportion, your backhand shots is always lower than 30%, then it\'s much likely that your have weakness in backhand attack and need to make improvement through training.
一个神奇的网球智能小助手，赶紧下载来跟我比一比谁的网球水平更高吧！
Settings have been changed. Do you want to save this target settings ?
Do You Want to Save This Live Video？
Settings have been changed. Do you want to save this personal data settings ?
Your Firmware is the most recent

Endurance is a result based on the comprehensive analysis of sports duration and intensity. A high endurance means good physical quality and duration. If your endurance is always low, it\'s necessary to consciously prolong the training time and intensity, to avoid physical deterioration.
Three indicators are flashing one by one (slowly)
Three indicators are flashing at the same time
Three indicators are flashing one by one (quickly)
Three indicators are on at the same time
All three indicators are on (when not charging)
Please connect your device to record live video
Register And Login means you agree
从今天起，你将踏上征途奋力向前，记住，我们的目标不是没有蛀牙，而是打到对手满地找牙！
最近的目标完成的很棒！明明已经那么优秀，你还在不断努力——这就是你和明明之间的区别。
1000次击球对你而言只是轻而易举，志在峰巅的攀登者从来不会陶醉在沿途的某个脚印。
据说一个网球选手在击球500万次之后能够成为真正的大师，现在你已经完成了千分之一。
恭喜你本月获得了第一！但需要提醒一下你，或许曾经有一份真诚的爱摆在你的面前，可是你去打球了。
三个月还没有人能打败你，现在明白什么叫“高处不胜寒”了吧。手下留情，多给年轻人一点机会。
当有一天你发现20000次击球其实和1次击球没什么区别时，你将明白什么叫做登峰造极了。
很少有人了解成为真正的天下第一是什么感觉，不过现在你完全有资格跟别人讲讲你的故事。
你居然完成了一次满分运动！恭喜你难以置信地击败了所有人，下一次我们将会给你增加难度。
Name Too Long That Can Not Save
Nick Name Can not Be Empty
The system detects that the GPS location service is not turned on.
Electricity is insufficient, please continue after charging
Viewing this video under cellular network might result in high data usage.
Failed to turn on Bluetooth .Please check the permissions
Please choose a password with at least 6 characters
Password and confirm password must be identical
Complete your personal information to customized your exercise plan.
Storage card not found, unable to save!

Explosive power is calculated based on your swing speed. The higher explosive power shows more aggressive your performance. Excellent ball speed helps you suppress your opponent and it is easier cause your opponent make movement errors. High frequency of weak explosive performance means necessary training is indispensable.
If the sensor is idled for over 10 minutes, it will be powered off automatically. You can choose to turn it off manually by selecting Poweroff in the Device Control option on the APP.
官方将主动联系每月击球榜前三名并给予物质奖励！
Upload your profile picture to get the ranking!
This app may not work correctly without the requested permissions.
This app may not work correctly without the requested permissions. Open the app settings screen to modify app permissions.
In case of any device failure, try the Factory Reset setting to reset the sensor.
If your sensor is connected to your mobile phone, select the Reset option from the Settings menu on the APP to restore.

If your sensor device is unable to connect with your mobile device, please conduct a hard reset using the reset pin provided with the package. Insert the pin into the USD reset connector for 2 sec and release. The indicator LED will blink 3 times indicating successful reset

For male professional tennis players, the average speed of swing is 130-175 km/h, with the ball speed of 160-220 km/h; for female professional tennis players, the average speed of swing is 110-135 km/h, with the ball speed of 130-170 km/h.
An new email has been sent successfully!
Restoring factory settings will clear all device information and delete today\'s records. Continue?
选择一个号码发送邀请
验证码短信可能略有延迟，确定返回并重新开始？
当前服务暂不支持此国家，请选择其它国家
不支持该地区发送短信
手机号码每天发送次数超限
每台手机每天发送次数超限
号码在App中每天发送短信的次数超限
需要校验的验证码错误
服务端根据duid获取平台错误
没有打开服务端验证开关
当前appkey发送短信的数量超过限额
当前手机号发送短信的数量超过限额
当前手机号在当前应用内发送超过限额
请求太频繁，API使用受限制
开关未打开，短信发送受限
请填写正确的手机号码
当前服务暂不支持此国家，请选择其它国家
客户端请求不能被识别。
请求提交的数据缺少必要的数据。
所有访问服务器的接口，在请求的头部必须加入指定格式的User-Agent。
请求传递的数据格式错误，服务器无法转换为JSON格式的数据。
提交的手机号码或者区号为空。
提交的手机号格式不正确（包括手机的区号）。
获取appKey控制发送短信的数据失败。
没有打开客户端发送短信的开关。
没有开通给当前地区发送短信的功能。
每分钟发送短信的数量超过限制。
手机号码每天发送短信的次数超出限制。
每台手机每天发送短信的次数超限。
手机号码在APP中每天发送短信的数量超限。
提交的校验验证码为空。
验证失败3次，验证码失效，请重新请求
用户提交校验的验证码错误。
没有打开通过网页端发送短信的开关。
通过服务端发送或验证短信的IP错误
服务端根据duid获取平台错误。
服务端根据duid获取平台错误
没有打开服务端验证开关
如果当前appkey对应的包名没有通过审核，每天次appkey+包名最多可以发送20条短信
当前手机号码每天最多可发送短信10条，包括客户端发送和WebApi发送
当前手机号码在当前应用下12小时内最多可发送文本验证码5条
请求太频繁，API使用受限制
开关未打开，短信发送受限
请填写正确的手机号码
当前服务暂不支持此国家，请选择其它国家
很抱歉，该手机号申请验证码次数过多，请明天重试！
发送验证码太频繁，请稍后再发！
Mob最新短信SDK,欢迎大家使用，你的好友邀请你加入；下载地址： http://www.mob.com
请确认你的国家或地区并输入手机号码
我们将发送<font color=#3cac17>验证码</font>短信到这个号码:
接收短信大约需要<font color=#209526>%s</font>秒
我们已发送<font color=#209526>验证码</font>短信到这个号码:
确定后将致电您的手机号，语音播报验证码.\n如不希望被来电打扰请使用短信验证码。
您的手机号码已验证成功
以下号码为诚信号码,无需验证短信:
验证码不正确，请重新输入
请填写正确的手机号码

Speed curve will help you to see the changes of your average swing speed over time. When the curve drops significantly at a specific time, it means your physical stamina begins to decline and you reach the limit to maintain a stable state. If your curve is very smooth, it means you are performing stably in that period of time.
Are you sure you are used to using your right hand?
单场运动时间低于大众平均水平
运动强度较高，训练及健身效果明显
相当于中速步行30,000步，慢跑13公里，登上958米高的山峰，成绩不错！
表现神勇，爆发力超越了全国85%的网球爱好者。

Notice:Pls serve 3 times to turn the sensor on
Attach the sensor to the racket, \'Serve\' 3 times, till the sensor\'s light is on
Blinking light means the sensor is on
The sensor features three indicators for device status:
Confirm to delete the training record of %s？
The average value is obtained from average exercise data processing of the users, while the recommend value is derived from your personal information combined with past performance.
To achieve your goals, you will
You are currently using the mobile network, the player will continue to consume traffic
\'Serve\' training mode will forecast and record your serve speed,you can set ball speed target before start training and check the statistical report after end training.
The following area will present your serve data in real time after connecting the device.
Press the \'start training\',the following area will record your serve training result.
The app is already in downloading list.
Please make sure you are connected to internet, download failed
New version is ready,click to install it.

In order to achieve better user experience, Coollang will continuously be rolling out new firmware upgrades. Before activating your upgrades, please ensure that your battery level is more than 50%, device is connected with the “Smart Tennis” APP, go to “Setting” and click “Upgrade Firmware”.
(In case of anomaly after firmware upgrades, please refer to “Restore to Factory Setting” in the next page)
Click the button below to update the firmware
Upgrate Failed , Pls Try Again Later.

After power on, the sensor will activate “Memory Mode” by default and automatically records your sport data, until your next connection with your “Smart Tennis” APP. It will then transmit your data onto your mobile device.For “Real Time” mode, or “Training Mode”, please connect your sensor device with your mobile device using the “Smart Tennis” APP.
After attaching your device onto the base of your racket, shake the base of your racket to power on your device.
(If your device does not power on, please charge it and try again.)
If the device is interrupted while recording, the missed real-time data will be recovered once saved.
Video Can not Play , Pls Connetc Device

After each exercise session, just connect your device once with your mobile device. After the data has been synchronised, your sport data will be uploaded to your personal account. Your achievements will be tracked chronologically.
